suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify that pure logic/store/data-transform frontend fixes can rely on direct automated coverage instead of agent-browser verification when there is no meaningful user-surface interaction to exercise.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both osint-core fix reviews reached the same conclusion: fix-entity-graph-type-collision and fix-saved-view-search-restore were resolved entirely in shared logic/store code with targeted regression tests that directly covered the bug, and both worker handoffs called out that browser automation was unnecessary for those fixes.
